title: Should We Buy Off-the-Shelf AI Tools or Build Custom AI for Our Business?
pageTitle: Should We Buy Off-the-Shelf AI Tools or Build Custom AI for Our Business? — Last Rev
description: The buy vs. build decision for AI isn't binary. Here's a practical framework for choosing when off-the-shelf tools win, when custom AI is worth it, and why most companies need both.
author: Last Rev Team
